input: When was Moorepay founded?
actual_output: Moorepay was founded in 1966.
expected_output: Moorepay was founded in 1966.
retrieval_context:
1: COMPANY OVERVIEW
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Moorepay is a UK-based payroll and HR software and services company, widely
regarded as a market leader in its field. It was founded in 1966, giving it
over half a century of experience in the payroll industry. The company serves
businesses with up to 1,000 employees, positioning itself primarily in the
small and medium-sized business (SMB) segment of the market.

AND KEY MILESTONES
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1966    Moorepay is founded.
        Merges with Mills Associates, another payroll bureau.
        Becomes the preferred payroll supplier of NatWest Bank and Royal Bank
        of Scotland after being acquired by Rebus for £44 million.
        Northgate Information Solutions (Northgate IS) acquires Rebus for
        £150 million.
        Moorepay acquires First Business Support Ltd, adding HR and Employment
        Law services to its offering.
        Moorepayhr, a cloud-based Payroll and HR Software solution built on
        Preceda technology, is launched.
        Moorepay becomes the first payroll company to receive the CIPP's
        Payroll Assurance Scheme accreditation.
        Bain Capital Private Equity acquires the NGA UK & Ireland and Moorepay
        businesses.
        Moorepay opens a new office in Farnborough, Hampshire.
2019    Anthony Peill joins Moorepay as Managing Director.
2022    Moorepay partners with Bizimply.
2023    Moorepay acquires Natural HR, a cloud-based HR software provider,
        marking a key milestone in Moorepay's strategy to offer a fully
        integrated, modular suite of payroll and HR software for SMBs.
2023    Moorepay wins Payroll Service Provider of the Year at the CIPP Awards.
        Apax Partners LLP acquires the Zellis Group from Bain Capital.

--- Moorepay holds several significant industry accreditations and has received
notable recognition: - CIPP Payroll Assurance Scheme (PAS): Moorepay was the first payroll company
    to be awarded the CIPP's Payroll Assurance Scheme accreditation.
  - HMRC Approval: Moorepay is an HMRC-approved payroll software provider.
  - ISO 27001: Moorepay holds ISO 27001 certification, the international
    standard for information security management, ensuring that personal data
    is protected to the highest standards.
  - BAB Accreditation: Moorepay is also BAB (Bacs Approved Bureau) accredited.
  - Payroll Service Provider of the Year 2023: At the CIPP Annual Excellence
    Awards in October 2023, Moorepay won this award, recognising the quality
    of its payroll teams and processes.
  - EcoVadis Silver Medal: Moorepay has retained Silver Medal status in the
    EcoVadis business sustainability ratings for two consecutive years, with a
    score of 74/100, placing the company in the top 15% of assessed businesses.
  - Microhive Gold Award: Awarded in recognition of employee participation in
    the Microhive programme, which supports charitable causes.

input: What is Moorepay's payslip accuracy rate?
actual_output: Moorepay maintains a 99.9% payslip accuracy rate.
expected_output: Moorepay maintains a 99.9% payslip accuracy rate.
retrieval_context:
--- Moorepay holds several significant industry accreditations and has received
notable recognition: - CIPP Payroll Assurance Scheme (PAS): Moorepay was the first payroll company
    to be awarded the CIPP's Payroll Assurance Scheme accreditation.
  - HMRC Approval: Moorepay is an HMRC-approved payroll software provider.
  - ISO 27001: Moorepay holds ISO 27001 certification, the international
    standard for information security management, ensuring that personal data
    is protected to the highest standards.
  - BAB Accreditation: Moorepay is also BAB (Bacs Approved Bureau) accredited.
  - Payroll Service Provider of the Year 2023: At the CIPP Annual Excellence
    Awards in October 2023, Moorepay won this award, recognising the quality
    of its payroll teams and processes.
  - EcoVadis Silver Medal: Moorepay has retained Silver Medal status in the
    EcoVadis business sustainability ratings for two consecutive years, with a
    score of 74/100, placing the company in the top 15% of assessed businesses.
  - Microhive Gold Award: Awarded in recognition of employee participation in
    the Microhive programme, which supports charitable causes.

SCALE AND CUSTOMERS
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Moorepay supports a customer base of approximately 10,000 clients across the
United Kingdom. The company produces millions of payslips every year and handles
around 250,000 queries from clients annually. The team comprises around 500
dedicated payroll and HR professionals, who collectively hold over 7,000 years
of industry experience.

ks. The platform is backed
by Microsoft Azure infrastructure and monitored by BITsight for security. MANAGED PAYROLL SERVICES
For businesses that prefer to fully outsource their payroll, Moorepay provides
managed payroll services. This covers data validation, calculations, payroll
processing, BACS payments, payslip printing and distribution, and regulatory
reporting. The company maintains a 99.9% payslip accuracy rate and can implement
a basic pay run in as little as 48 hours via its Managed Emergency Payroll
Service. Managed payroll is typically suited to businesses with between 30 and
1,000 employees.

input: What are the differences between Moorepay's managed payroll services and its bureau payroll services?
actual_output:
Moorepay's managed payroll services involve fully outsourcing payroll, including data validation, calculations, payroll processing, BACS payments, payslip printing and distribution, and regulatory reporting. This service is typically suited for businesses with between 30 and 1,000 employees.

In contrast, the bureau payroll services provide expert support while allowing the client to retain a degree of control over the payroll process.
expected_output: Managed payroll is a fully outsourced service where Moorepay handles everything — data validation, calculations, processing, BACS payments, payslip printing, and regulatory reporting — typically suited to businesses with 30–1,000 employees. Bureau payroll services offer a middle ground: Moorepay's expert staff handle the payroll process, but the client retains a greater degree of control rather than fully handing over the function.

input: What accreditations and awards has Moorepay received, and what do they recognise?
actual_output:
Moorepay has received several significant accreditations and awards:

1. **CIPP Payroll Assurance Scheme (PAS)**: First payroll company to be awarded this accreditation.
2. **HMRC Approval**: Recognised as an HMRC-approved payroll software provider.
3. **ISO 27001**: Certification for information security management, ensuring high standards of personal data protection.
4. **BAB Accreditation**: Bacs Approved Bureau accreditation.
5. **Payroll Service Provider of the Year 2023**: Awarded at the CIPP Annual Excellence Awards, recognising the quality of payroll teams and processes.
6. **EcoVadis Silver Medal**: Retained for two consecutive years, with a score of 74/100, placing Moorepay in the top 15% of assessed businesses for sustainability.
7. **Microhive Gold Award**: Recognises employee participation in the Microhive programme supporting charitable causes.

Additionally, Moorepay holds an "Excellent" rating on Trustpilot.
expected_output: Moorepay holds several accreditations and awards: CIPP Payroll Assurance Scheme (PAS) — the first payroll company to receive this; HMRC approval as a payroll software provider; ISO 27001 for information security management; BAB (Bacs Approved Bureau) accreditation; Payroll Service Provider of the Year 2023 at the CIPP Annual Excellence Awards; EcoVadis Silver Medal for business sustainability (top 15% of assessed businesses, 74/100 score); and a Microhive Gold Award for employee charitable participation.
retrieval_context:
--- Moorepay holds several significant industry accreditations and has received
notable recognition: - CIPP Payroll Assurance Scheme (PAS): Moorepay was the first payroll company
    to be awarded the CIPP's Payroll Assurance Scheme accreditation.
  - HMRC Approval: Moorepay is an HMRC-approved payroll software provider.
  - ISO 27001: Moorepay holds ISO 27001 certification, the international
    standard for information security management, ensuring that personal data
    is protected to the highest standards.
  - BAB Accreditation: Moorepay is also BAB (Bacs Approved Bureau) accredited.
  - Payroll Service Provider of the Year 2023: At the CIPP Annual Excellence
    Awards in October 2023, Moorepay won this award, recognising the quality
    of its payroll teams and processes.
  - EcoVadis Silver Medal: Moorepay has retained Silver Medal status in the
    EcoVadis business sustainability ratings for two consecutive years, with a
    score of 74/100, placing the company in the top 15% of assessed businesses.
  - Microhive Gold Award: Awarded in recognition of employee participation in
    the Microhive programme, which supports charitable causes.

ITATIONS AND AWARDS
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Moorepay holds several significant industry accreditations and has received
notable recognition:

input: What HR software modules does Moorepay offer, and how do they connect to payroll?
actual_output:
Moorepay's HR software includes the following modules: 
- Time & Attendance
- Recruitment
- Performance Management (including 360° feedback and social recognition)
- Expenses Management
- People Analytics (real-time dashboards and board-ready reporting)
- Employee Self-Service

I don't have enough information in the provided context to answer how they connect to payroll.

Critically, HR and payroll are offered via a single integrated interface, so data does not need to be manually transferred between separate systems.

input: What is the Zellis Group, and where does Moorepay sit within it?
actual_output: The Zellis Group is made up of four businesses: Zellis, Moorepay, Benifex, and Hastee. Moorepay operates as a distinct business within the Zellis Group, focusing on small and growing businesses with up to 1,000 employees, while Zellis targets medium-to-enterprise organisations.
expected_output: The Zellis Group is made up of four businesses: Zellis, Moorepay, Benifex, and Hastee. Each operates with autonomy for its own customer segment. Zellis targets medium-to-enterprise organisations, while Moorepay focuses on small and growing businesses with up to 1,000 employees. The group employs over 2,000 people across the UK, Ireland, and India, and is owned by Apax Partners LLP.
retrieval_context:
es, positioning itself primarily in the
small and medium-sized business (SMB) segment of the market. Moorepay is part of the Zellis Group, which also includes Zellis (focused on
medium-to-enterprise organisations), Benifex, and Hastee. Apax Partners LLP,
a leading global private equity advisory firm, acquired the Zellis Group from
Bain Capital. Bain Capital had originally acquired Zellis and Moorepay in 2017.

CTURE AND OWNERSHIP
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Moorepay operates as a distinct business within the Zellis Group. The Zellis

customer segments. Zellis targets medium-to-enterprise organisations, while
Moorepay focuses on small and growing businesses with up to 1,000 employees.
The group's overall purpose is described as "powering exceptional employee
experiences."

input: Was Moorepay the first company to receive the CIPP Payroll Assurance Scheme accreditation, or just among the first?
actual_output: Moorepay was the first payroll company to be awarded the CIPP's Payroll Assurance Scheme accreditation.
expected_output: Moorepay was the first payroll company to be awarded the CIPP's Payroll Assurance Scheme (PAS) accreditation — not merely among the first.
retrieval_context:
--- Moorepay holds several significant industry accreditations and has received
notable recognition: - CIPP Payroll Assurance Scheme (PAS): Moorepay was the first payroll company
    to be awarded the CIPP's Payroll Assurance Scheme accreditation.
  - HMRC Approval: Moorepay is an HMRC-approved payroll software provider.
  - ISO 27001: Moorepay holds ISO 27001 certification, the international
    standard for information security management, ensuring that personal data
    is protected to the highest standards.
  - BAB Accreditation: Moorepay is also BAB (Bacs Approved Bureau) accredited.
  - Payroll Service Provider of the Year 2023: At the CIPP Annual Excellence
    Awards in October 2023, Moorepay won this award, recognising the quality
    of its payroll teams and processes.
  - EcoVadis Silver Medal: Moorepay has retained Silver Medal status in the
    EcoVadis business sustainability ratings for two consecutive years, with a
    score of 74/100, placing the company in the top 15% of assessed businesses.
  - Microhive Gold Award: Awarded in recognition of employee participation in
    the Microhive programme, which supports charitable causes.

AND KEY MILESTONES
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1966    Moorepay is founded.
        Merges with Mills Associates, another payroll bureau.
        Becomes the preferred payroll supplier of NatWest Bank and Royal Bank
        of Scotland after being acquired by Rebus for £44 million.
        Northgate Information Solutions (Northgate IS) acquires Rebus for
        £150 million.
        Moorepay acquires First Business Support Ltd, adding HR and Employment
        Law services to its offering.
        Moorepayhr, a cloud-based Payroll and HR Software solution built on
        Preceda technology, is launched.
        Moorepay becomes the first payroll company to receive the CIPP's
        Payroll Assurance Scheme accreditation.
        Bain Capital Private Equity acquires the NGA UK & Ireland and Moorepay
        businesses.
        Moorepay opens a new office in Farnborough, Hampshire.
2019    Anthony Peill joins Moorepay as Managing Director.
2022    Moorepay partners with Bizimply.
2023    Moorepay acquires Natural HR, a cloud-based HR software provider,
        marking a key milestone in Moorepay's strategy to offer a fully
        integrated, modular suite of payroll and HR software for SMBs.
2023    Moorepay wins Payroll Service Provider of the Year at the CIPP Awards.
        Apax Partners LLP acquires the Zellis Group from Bain Capital.

actual_output: I don't have enough information in the provided context to answer that.

retrieval_context:
ks. The platform is backed
by Microsoft Azure infrastructure and monitored by BITsight for security. MANAGED PAYROLL SERVICES
For businesses that prefer to fully outsource their payroll, Moorepay provides
managed payroll services. This covers data validation, calculations, payroll
processing, BACS payments, payslip printing and distribution, and regulatory
reporting. The company maintains a 99.9% payslip accuracy rate and can implement
a basic pay run in as little as 48 hours via its Managed Emergency Payroll
Service. Managed payroll is typically suited to businesses with between 30 and
1,000 employees.

Moorepay explicitly does not use ticketing systems for support queries.

1: COMPANY OVERVIEW
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Moorepay is a UK-based payroll and HR software and services company, widely
regarded as a market leader in its field. It was founded in 1966, giving it
over half a century of experience in the payroll industry. The company serves
businesses with up to 1,000 employees, positioning itself primarily in the
small and medium-sized business (SMB) segment of the market.

SCALE AND CUSTOMERS
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Moorepay supports a customer base of approximately 10,000 clients across the
United Kingdom. The company produces millions of payslips every year and handles
around 250,000 queries from clients annually. The team comprises around 500
dedicated payroll and HR professionals, who collectively hold over 7,000 years
of industry experience.

input: Is Moorepay's payroll software hosted on its own proprietary infrastructure?
actual_output: I don't have enough information in the provided context to answer that.
expected_output: No. Moorepay's cloud-based payroll software is backed by Microsoft Azure infrastructure, not proprietary Moorepay infrastructure. Security monitoring is provided by BITsight.
retrieval_context:
ks. The platform is backed
by Microsoft Azure infrastructure and monitored by BITsight for security. MANAGED PAYROLL SERVICES
For businesses that prefer to fully outsource their payroll, Moorepay provides
managed payroll services. This covers data validation, calculations, payroll
processing, BACS payments, payslip printing and distribution, and regulatory
reporting. The company maintains a 99.9% payslip accuracy rate and can implement
a basic pay run in as little as 48 hours via its Managed Emergency Payroll
Service. Managed payroll is typically suited to businesses with between 30 and
1,000 employees.

f payroll and HR products and services,
broadly split into software and managed/outsourced services. PAYROLL SOFTWARE
Moorepay's payroll software is cloud-based and HMRC-approved. It automates
payroll calculations, submissions, and compliance tasks. The platform is backed
by Microsoft Azure infrastructure and monitored by BITsight for security.
